title: Blue Canyon Gecko Towel Rail, Shower Caddy with Quick Lock vacuum Suction Cup, No Drill and No Screws Required, Removable, Reusable and Repositionable, Stainless Steel
features: [ STURDY MATERIAL ]: This Towel Rail is made of high-quality stainless steel materials and can remain intact for years, even in humid environments. It occupies a small space and frees up more countertop space. This stainless-steel bathroom Rail is removable and easy to clean.

[ EASY INSTALLATION ]: The Gecko Quick Lock suction cup is a unique vacuum lock system; it only requires a 60-degree turn to be securely fixed to the surface. This Towel Rail is completely reusable and can be repositioned as needed leaving no holes or marks. Our Gecko Towel Rail never rusts or flakes.

[ MULTI-FUNCTIONAL ]: This powerful suction cup holder is perfect for a bathroom and kitchen storage organizer, such as towels, napkins and loofahs. Our Towel Rail is removable, allowing easy removal without leaving marks or sticky residue.

[ CONTEMPORARY DESIGN ]: The voguish Towel Rail with ergonomic design not only drains the excess moister but also gives your bathroom a modern and aesthetic look. Thanks to its Stainless-steel finish, this suction Towel Rail is perfect around your bathroom sink and looks fantastic in the kitchen too.

[ REUSABLE & VERSATILE ]: The Gecko Stainless-Steel Towel Rail is reusable, and when repositioned, it leaves no holes or marks. This shower wire rack is part of our wider range of shower Rails and baskets, which includes something to suit whatever shape and size bathroom.
